name: rkt
description: Personal AI toolbox - project bootstrapping, workflow orchestration, and prompt engineering

interface.shortDescription: Project bootstrapping, workflow orchestration, and prompt engineering.
interface.longDescription: Davies's personal AI toolbox for spinning up project workflows, coordinating implementation, resolving reviews, syncing project scaffolding, and crafting production-ready prompts.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this repo with my rkt workflow
